working_on.notes: Completed migration of Books to generic DataTable. Added coverUrl to DB. Fixed Prisma relation issues. Implemented numeric sequence call numbers.

recent_changes.description: Book Migration to DataTable with Advanced Filters and Bulk Delete
Added coverUrl field to Book model and synced with DB
Fixed Prisma categoryId vs category connect validation error
Call Number suffix changed to numeric sequence (.1, .2...)

errors_encountered.solution: Handle paginated response by extracting 'items' and adding robust type checking
Use relation connect syntax: category: { connect: { id: categoryId } }
Run 'npx prisma db push' after schema update

decisions_made.decision: Use numeric suffixes for duplicate call numbers
decisions_made.reason: Clearer sequence and aligns with library standards (.1, .2...)

decisions_made.decision: Fetch categories with limit: 100 for filter dropdowns
decisions_made.reason: Ensure all categories are available in filters without full pagination complexity

decisions_made.decision: Show book cover preview in ISBN smart fetch
decisions_made.reason: Improve UX and data verification before saving
